Title: Respiratory Excellence: Comprehensive API Solutions for COPD Triple Therapy
Summary: We continue to strengthen our position in the respiratory sector by providing high-quality APIs like Fluticasone Furoate and Revefenacin, offering a one-stop solution for COPD combination therapies.
FullContent: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) remains a leading cause of global mortality, with treatment paradigms shifting toward triple and dual-combination inhalation therapies. Our company is at the forefront of this evolution, ensuring a stable supply of critical APIs such as Fluticasone Furoate and Revefenacin. Beyond providing high-purity materials with precisely controlled particle size distributions, we offer a comprehensive supporting system for combination drug development. Our one-stop solution helps pharmaceutical manufacturers shorten R&D cycles and ensure optimal lung deposition and bioequivalence, driving the next generation of respiratory care.

Title: Psychiatry Portfolio Expansion: Addressing the Gap in High-End APIs
Summary: The registration of new APIs including Paliperidone, Mianserin HCl, Mirogabalin Besylate, and Safinamide Mesylate marks a significant milestone in filling the supply gap for premium psychiatric treatments.
FullContent: As global awareness of mental health continues to rise, the demand for advanced psychiatric medications has seen unprecedented growth. We have successfully completed the registration of several heavyweight APIs, including the next-generation antipsychotic Paliperidone, the antidepressant Mianserin HCl, Mirogabalin Besylate for neuropathic pain, and Safinamide Mesylate for Parkinson's disease. These registrations demonstrate our mastery of complex synthesis processes and our commitment to reducing dependence on imported high-end APIs. By providing these essential materials, we empower our partners to deliver more accessible and effective treatment options to patients worldwide.

Title: Breakthrough in Innovative Targets: Finerenone and the Era of Precision Targeting
Summary: As a highly selective non-steroidal mineralocorticoid receptor antagonist (MRA), Finerenone's registration progress is set to usher in a new era of precision targeting for cardio-renal diseases.
FullContent: Finerenone represents a paradigm shift in the protection of heart and kidney health. As a highly-selective non-steroidal mineralocorticoid receptor antagonist, it effectively inhibits the overactivation of mineralocorticoid receptors, thereby reducing inflammation and fibrosis. This significantly lowers cardiovascular risks for patients with chronic kidney disease associated with type 2 diabetes. We are actively advancing the industrialization of Finerenone, ensuring high purity and low impurity levels through optimized synthetic routes. Our goal is to provide precise and safe targeted therapy support, helping global chronic disease management move toward the era of precision medicine.
